name: zacatl-express-sqlite-backend
description: Express + SQLite (Sequelize) backend using Zacatl framework

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && npx tsx ../../../../scripts/build/fix-esm.ts dist && npx tsx ../../../../scripts/build/rewrite-runtime-aliases.ts dist @sentzunhat/zacatl/ @sentzunhat/zacatl/
